A clear, concise description of what is broken.

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or unexpected output.

## Environment
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Python version:** (e.g. 3.11.9)
- **agentic-web3-rag version:** (e.g. 0.1.0 — run `pip show agentic-web3-rag`)
- **Qdrant version:** (e.g. 1.15.5 — run `docker ps`)
- **Install method:** pip / git clone / Docker

Paste relevant log output here (uvicorn logs, pipeline output, etc.)

## Additional context
Any other context, screenshots, or links that might help.
